parsed_review.summary: CP00-427 descriptor-only RP14 settlement-core pack passes independent read-only review; all coverage/distribution and no-write/no-real-data/Claude-non-final-approver/Hermes-non-runtime boundaries verified, production_ready correctly false. One cosmetic P3 test-title typo; no blocking issues.

findings.title: Test title says "RP13" but pack/program is RP14
findings.details: The test description string reads "CP00-427 plan binding covers the planned 150 RP13 p01 closeout p02 foundation units". CP00-427 is an RP14 (Partner Settlement) pack; RP13 is only the upstream program. The analogous CP00-426 test at line 54 correctly says "RP14". Cosmetic copy/paste typo in a test name only — no effect on assertions, runtime, or data.
findings.recommendation: Change "150 RP13" to "150 RP14" in the test title at line 113. Non-blocking.
